description: A color photograph of a stack of rectangular wrapped packages arranged on a metal table, several marked with the handwritten word 'POPEYE'. Behind them is a backdrop reading 'SAN CLEMENTE STATION SEIZED CONTRABAND' with a Border Patrol badge and an Interstate 5 shield. The packages are consistent with a narcotics seizure display.
notable_text: POPEYE; SAN CLEMENTE STATION SEIZED CONTRABAND
